author: mark
text:
Plugin runner: bounded output + timeout

Every plugin invocation now runs through run_with_limits with
1 MiB stdout cap and 30s wall-clock timeout (both configurable
via BALLS_PLUGIN_MAX_STREAM_BYTES / BALLS_PLUGIN_TIMEOUT_SECS).
Children spawn in their own process group so timeout SIGKILLs
the whole subtree — killing just the plugin's shell leaves
forked sleeps holding our stdout pipe open.

Reader threads drain past the cap so the child never blocks on
pipe-full. Writer thread for stdin so main reaches the
try_wait loop even when the plugin ignores its input.

New tests/plugin_limits.rs + unit tests in plugin/limits.rs.
Split plugin/runner.rs into runner.rs (158 lines) + limits.rs
(192 lines).
